_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Document the protection needs (i.e., security controls) for the information system(s) and network(s) and document appropriately.
reference_document_element_description: Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required by applicable data protection and AI regulations, including processing registrations, DPO appointments, and AI system registrations.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-008 (SP, cosine: 0.543), RC-K-010 (RC, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.460). Shared vocabulary: [protection, system]. DCWF-only terms [appropriately, controls, document, i, information, needs] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, applicable, appointments, data, dpo, filings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.859, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Document the protection needs (i.e., security controls) for the information syst" and "Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.548 > STS 0.460 (gap +0.088). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [protection, system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [protection, system]. DCWF-only: [appropriately, controls, document, i, information, needs]. WIDAI-only: [ai, applicable, appointments, data, dpo, filings].
